Meaning.Vi: Giấy thuê (tài sản), hợp đồng thuê
Meaning.En: A legal document granting the right to use property or equipment for a specified period in exchange for rent.
Meaning.Example: The company signed a five-year lease for the office space.

Situation.Vi: Người thuê ký hợp đồng thuê nhà hoặc xe.
Situation.En: A tenant signs a written agreement to rent a house or vehicle.

Situation.Vi: Chủ sở hữu nhận tiền thuê theo điều khoản hợp đồng.
Situation.En: The owner receives regular rent payments as outlined in the lease agreement.

Meaning.Vi: Thuê (tài sản) theo hợp đồng, cho thuê
Meaning.En: To grant the use of property or equipment to someone for a specified period in exchange for rent; or to rent property or equipment under such an agreement.
Meaning.Example: We leased a car for the duration of our trip.

Situation.Vi: Doanh nghiệp thuê văn phòng từ chủ nhà.
Situation.En: A business rents office space from a landlord under a formal lease agreement.

Situation.Vi: Người dùng thuê thiết bị công nghệ trong thời gian ngắn.
Situation.En: Customers can lease electronic devices for a fixed term instead of buying them outright.
